seo.title: Lawyer in Model Town, Lahore | Inheritance & Property — Saeed Law Firm
seo.description: Model Town lawyer for inheritance partition, legacy property disputes, family matters, and tax cases. Lahore's oldest planned scheme.

hero.intro: Model Town lawyer for inheritance partition, legacy property disputes, family matters, and tax cases. Lahore's oldest planned scheme.

bodyMarkdown:
Model Town is Lahore's oldest planned residential scheme — established in the 1920s as a cooperative housing society and now home to legacy properties that have passed through three or four generations. The legal-case profile of a **lawyer in Model Town Lahore** is therefore unusually weighted toward inheritance, partition, and mutation work: family settlements that need formalising, plots held jointly by twelve heirs whose names never made it into the revenue record, and properties whose registered title differs from the names actually living there. Add the family-law work that follows from a long-established residential community and the high-value nature of the properties, and Model Town engagements often span multiple practice areas. **Saeed Law Firm** has served Model Town residents across the Society blocks since 1975. Our office at 13 Fane Road is a 25-minute drive from Model Town.

### Model Town-Specific Matters We Handle

**Inheritance and succession.** The single most frequent Model Town engagement. Properties acquired in the 1940s–1960s are now held by descendants two and three generations removed from the original allottee. Succession certificates from Civil Court Lahore, NADRA family-tree certificates, and mutation in revenue records are required to clean title before any sale or partition.

**Partition suits.** Where co-heirs cannot agree, a partition suit at the Civil Court Lahore is the resolution. The court appoints a commission to physically divide where feasible or orders sale and distribution of proceeds.

**Mutation/intiqal of legacy property.** Multiple un-mutated transfers across generations are common. Mutation appeals before the Tehsildar, Assistant Commissioner, and Collector are routine work.

**Cooperative society disputes.** Model Town Cooperative Society's records and decisions are sometimes challenged on internal grievance and, if unresolved, in civil and constitutional forums.

**Family and matrimonial matters.** Long-established Model Town families bring family-law work — see our [family lawyer in Lahore](/family-lawyer-in-lahore) and [property lawyer in Lahore](/property-lawyer-in-lahore) pages.

**Tax cases on legacy properties.** Inheritance-driven property valuations frequently trigger FBR notices on wealth and capital gains. See our [tax lawyer in Lahore](/tax-lawyer-in-lahore) page.

### Where Model Town Matters Are Heard

- **Civil Courts Lahore** at Aiwan-e-Adal — partition, succession, declaration ([court page →](/courts/district-court-lawyer-lahore))
- **Revenue Authorities** — Tehsildar, AC, Collector for mutation work
- **Family Courts** at Aiwan-e-Adal — family matters ([court page →](/courts/family-court-lawyer-lahore))
- **Lahore High Court** — second appeals, writ jurisdiction over revenue authorities, Companies Bench for cooperative society matters ([court page →](/courts/lawyer-at-lahore-high-court))

### Coordinated Strategy for Multi-Generational Inheritance

The work pattern that most Model Town families need is coordinated:

1. **NADRA family-tree certificate** establishing all heirs
2. **Succession certificate** from Civil Court for movables and listed assets
3. **Mutation in revenue records** for the immovable property
4. **Family settlement deed** if heirs agree on partition
5. **Partition suit** if they do not

Treating these as separate matters with different lawyers extends the timeline by years. A single coordinated engagement — what we typically run for Model Town clients — finishes the workstream in 12–24 months instead of 4–5.

### Travel and Consultation

Office to Model Town centre: ~25 minutes by car. We offer Zoom and WhatsApp consultations for senior clients who prefer not to travel. Site visits and family meetings at Model Town addresses arranged where multiple heirs need to be present.

### Why Saeed Law Firm for Model Town

- 50+ years of Lahore inheritance practice — Model Town legacy matters need exactly this depth
- Coordinated multi-forum work (civil, revenue, family, tax)
- Office in central Lahore, easy court access
- Bilal Saeed personally reviews inheritance matters given their generational complexity

### Frequently Asked Questions

**My Model Town property is in my grandfather's name. How do I update title?**
Through NADRA family-tree certificate, succession certificate from Civil Court, and mutation in the revenue record. We run this as a coordinated engagement.

**Can co-heirs force sale of a Model Town plot?**
Yes — through a partition suit at Civil Court Lahore. The court will partition by metes and bounds where feasible or order sale and distribution of proceeds.

**Where do I challenge a mutation entry I disagree with?**
First at the Assistant Commissioner level under the Land Revenue Act 1967, then Collector, with further appeal to the LHC on writ jurisdiction.

**Do Model Town Cooperative Society decisions need to be challenged at the society first?**
Yes — internal grievance is the first stop for most society-level decisions. Civil and constitutional remedies follow if unresolved.

**How much does a lawyer in Model Town Lahore charge?**
Standard firm rates. Coordinated inheritance engagements are quoted as a package given the multi-step nature of the work.

values: Inheritance & succession of Model Town plots

details.label: Travel From Our Office
values: ~25 minutes by car from Fane Road

faqs.q: How do I book a consultation with Saeed Law Firm?
faqs.a: Use the contact form on this site, call our Fane Road office, or WhatsApp us. We respond within one business day and schedule a same-week appointment for most matters.

faqs.q: Do you serve clients outside Lahore?
faqs.a: Yes. We represent clients across Pakistan and overseas Pakistanis, with primary court appearances in Lahore. Remote consultations are available via Zoom and WhatsApp.

relatedPages.title: Family Lawyer in Lahore
relatedPages.description: Hire an experienced family lawyer in Lahore. Saeed Law Firm handles divorce, khula, child custody, and nikah disputes at Lahore Family Courts. Established 1975.

relatedPages.title: Civil Lawyer in Lahore
relatedPages.description: Civil lawyer in Lahore handling suits for declaration, possession, recovery, specific performance, and damages at Civil Courts and Lahore High Court.
